ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trials" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the current status of the trial */,
  "iteration" INTEGER /* Iteration number of the trial */,
  "objective" REAL /* Objective value achieved by the trial */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trial was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trial was last updated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the trial */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "experiment_description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES statuses ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial associated with this metric */,
  "train_accuracy" REAL /* Training accuracy achieved during the trial */,
  "train_loss" REAL /* Training loss recorded during the trial */,
  "val_accuracy" REAL /* Validation accuracy recorded during the trial */,
  "val_loss" REAL /* Validation loss recorded during the trial */,
  "val_accuracy_uncertainty" REAL /* Uncertainty in validation accuracy */,
  "val_loss_uncertainty" REAL /* Uncertainty in validation loss */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metrics_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration entry */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial associated with this configuration */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter (e.g., dropout_rate, learning_rate) */,
  "parameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  "parameter_type" TEXT /* Type of the parameter (e.g., float, int, string) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_configurations_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial associated with this log */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the logged event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., start, end, error) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Level of the log (e.g., debug, info, warn, error) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_logs_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model version entry */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial associated with this model version */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model used in the trial */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the model */,
  "model_framework" TEXT /* Framework used for the model (e.g., TensorFlow, PyTorch) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hyperparameters" (
  "hyperparam_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hyperparameter entry */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial associated with this hyperparameter */,
  "hyperparam_name" TEXT /* Name of the hyperparameter (e.g., batch_size) */,
  "hyperparam_value" REAL /* Value of the hyperparameter */,
  "hyperparam_type" TEXT /* Type of the hyperparameter (e.g., int, float) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hyperparam_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hyperparameters_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trial_executions" (
  "execution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each execution entry */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial associated with this execution */,
  "execution_time" REAL /* Time taken to execute the trial in seconds */,
  "hardware_used" TEXT /* Hardware used for the execution (e.g., GPU, CPU) */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the trial execution */,
  "execution_status" TEXT /* Status of the trial execution (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("execution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_executions_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trial_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report entry */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial associated with this report */,
  "report_file" TEXT /* File path to the generated report */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_reports_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status (e.g., INTERMEDIATE, COMPLETED) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trial_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note entry */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial associated with this note */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the note */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the note was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the note was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_notes_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_notes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trial_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag entry */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial associated with this tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_tags_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trial_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship entry */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial associated with this relationship */,
  "related_trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related trial */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., parent, child) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_relationships_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_relationships_related_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("related_trial_id") REFERENCES trials ("trial_id")
)
